Hey there!
My name is Leonhard Reiter aka Lenni and I am master student in psychology. I’m interested in psychological methods, R, meta-science and Bayesian statistics. Currently I work both at the University of Vienna as a student assistant at the Social and Economic Psychology group under Prof. Dr. Robert Böhm and at the Institute for Cognition and Behavior of the WU Vienna as a research intern under Prof. Dr. Susann Fiedler.
If you want to chat about stats or want to collaborate write me an email :)
